title: lycopodium selago var. recurvum
intro: Lycopodium selago var. recurvum, also known as the forked club moss, is a type of plant that belongs to the lycopodiaceae family, which includes various species of club mosses. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lycopodium selago var. recurvum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Lycopodium selago var. recurvum is often prepared as a tincture, infusion, or decoction for its medicinal and health benefits.
